construct_verdict_reason: All items directly measure physical health limitations on everyday functioning within the specified domain of moderate physical effort, stair climbing, and activity/work reduction.

items.reason: Directly measures limitation in moderate physical effort (walking 30 minutes, household cleaning) as described in construct definition.
Directly measures limitation in stair climbing, explicitly mentioned in construct definition.
Measures reduced activity performance due to physical health in past four weeks, core to functional health status construct.
Measures work and activity limitation due to physical health, directly aligned with construct's focus on reduced work performance.
